title: Why Do Our Park Benches Have Tiny Hats?
content: Has anyone else noticed the little knitted hats on the park benches downtown? They’re bright colors and seem hand-made. I always thought it was some quirky art project or maybe a local prank. Anyone know the story behind them? It’s honestly making my morning walks a lot more cheerful!
author: NightShiftDonna

content: Hey Donna! Those tiny hats are part of a 'yarn bombing' event by local knitters to spread joy and add color to the city. It’s like graffiti, but cozier! I spotted one with a tiny pom-pom and now I smile every time I pass by a bench. Sweetest prank ever!
author: DirtbikeRay
